title: The Internet: A Double-Edged Sword in Society
passage:
The Role of the Internet in Modern Society

The internet has transformed the way we live, work, and communicate. In the past few decades, it has become an essential part of our daily lives. From social media platforms to online shopping, the internet offers numerous conveniences that were unimaginable a few years ago. However, despite its many advantages, the internet also presents several challenges that society must confront.

One of the most significant benefits of the internet is the accessibility of information. Users can easily find answers to their questions, research various topics, and access educational materials from anywhere in the world. This democratization of knowledge has empowered individuals and enhanced learning opportunities.

Moreover, the internet has revolutionized communication. People can connect with others across the globe instantly, fostering relationships that transcend geographical boundaries. This has led to a more interconnected world, where cultural exchange is more frequent and diverse.

However, the internet also has its downsides. Privacy concerns have emerged as a major issue, with personal data often being collected without users’ consent. Furthermore, the spread of misinformation and cyberbullying has become rampant, impacting individuals' mental health and societal trust.

In conclusion, while the internet plays a crucial role in shaping modern society, it is important to navigate its complexities. Balancing its benefits and challenges will determine how it continues to influence our lives.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is one major advantage of the internet mentioned in the passage?
questions.explanation: Option B is correct because the passage states that the internet has revolutionized communication, allowing people to connect instantly.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What challenge does the passage highlight regarding the internet?
questions.explanation: Option C is correct as the passage highlights privacy concerns as a major issue arising from internet usage.

questions.text: The internet has eliminated all privacy issues.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that privacy concerns have emerged as a major issue, indicating that not all privacy issues have been resolved.

questions.text: Does the author believe that the internet is only beneficial?
questions.explanation: The author discusses both benefits and challenges of the internet, indicating a balanced view.

questions.instruction: Match the following benefits with their descriptions.

descriptions.1: Allows users to research various topics easily.

vocabulary.meaning: The process of making something accessible to all, like knowledge.
False or misleading information spread, especially on social media.
To deal with or face a challenge or issue.

tactics:
Hướng dẫn
